channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Remains of US soldier who went missing in Morocco have been recovered
item.description: The remains of a U.S. soldier who went missing during military drills in Morocco were recovered in the Atlantic Ocean, the army said. Military teams are searching for a second missing soldier.
item.content:encoded:
The remains of a U.S. soldier who went missing during military drills in Morocco were recovered in the Atlantic Ocean, the army said. Military teams are searching for a second missing soldier.

(Image credit: Mosa'ab Elshamy)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. cruise passengers fly back for hantavirus monitoring, as one tests positive
item.description: Passengers are returning to their home countries after weeks on the ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak. Most of the Americans aboard are headed for Nebraska to be evaluated by health officials.
item.content:encoded:
Passengers are returning to their home countries after weeks on the ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak. Most of the Americans aboard are headed for Nebraska to be evaluated by health officials.

(Image credit: Chris McGrath)
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang

item.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father
item.description: The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.
item.content:encoded:
The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.

(Image credit: Ilia Yefimovich)
item.dc:creator: Ruth Sherlock

item.title: Trump rejects Iran's latest response to U.S. ceasefire proposal
item.description: Iran delivered its response to Pakistani mediators on Sunday, according to the state-run Islamic Republic News Agency.
item.content:encoded:
Iran delivered its response to Pakistani mediators on Sunday, according to the state-run Islamic Republic News Agency.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: A chocolate laboratory in Italy will be good for chocolate eaters — and farmers
item.description: The chocolate biz is raising the bar with a lab to assess cacao beans from around the world. (Talk about a sweet gig!) Consumers and farmers stand to benefit from the "Standard of Excellence" program.
item.content:encoded:
The chocolate biz is raising the bar with a lab to assess cacao beans from around the world. (Talk about a sweet gig!) Consumers and farmers stand to benefit from the "Standard of Excellence" program.

(Image credit: Valerio Muscella for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Ari Daniel

item.title: Keir Starmer's party lost big in U.K. local elections. Here's what comes next
item.description: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.
item.content:encoded:
U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.

(Image credit: Hannah McKay/AP)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: Happy Mother's Day to the kindest mom. P.S. Your kindness annoyed me when I was a kid
item.description: She and her siblings had to make tea for and share food with every visitor. That did not make her happy. Today she has a different perspective. So she finally asked her mom: What made you so kind?
item.content:encoded:
She and her siblings had to make tea for and share food with every visitor. That did not make her happy. Today she has a different perspective. So she finally asked her mom: What made you so kind?

(Image credit: Family photo)
item.dc:creator: Esther Ndumi Ngumbi

item.title: Of course we look for ourselves in art — but if we stop there, we're missing out
item.description: As I watched the new series, I only cared about Piggy — the thoughtful, smart kid stranded on an island with other boys. That made me think about what we look for in art.
item.content:encoded:
Lord of the Flies adaptation.'/>

As I watched the new series, I only cared about Piggy — the thoughtful, smart kid stranded on an island with other boys. That made me think about what we look for in art.

(Image credit: J Redza)
item.dc:creator: Glen Weldon

item.title: Sunday Puzzle: Words in a country
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WAMU listener Russell Weeden and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WAMU listener Russell Weeden and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.dc:creator: Will Shortz

item.title: How a pill approved 25 years ago transformed cancer treatment
item.description: When the Food and Drug Administration approved Gleevec to treat a form of leukemia in 2001, it ushered in a new era in cancer care.
item.content:encoded:
When the Food and Drug Administration approved Gleevec to treat a form of leukemia in 2001, it ushered in a new era in cancer care.

(Image credit: Kristyna Wentz-Graff)
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin
